basic_details.job_title: CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 57 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical Office Ghazipur (CMO Ghazipur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 57 Urban ASHA Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 20 years Maximum Age: 45 years

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:ghazipur.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Recruitment 2026 - Overview
CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CMO Ghazipur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website:ghazipur.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Recruitment 2026 is 03-07-2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Urban ASHA post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 57 vacancies announced for the Urban ASHA post in the Chief Medical Office Ghazipur recruitment drive for the year 2026. This offers a significant number of opportunities for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for the Urban ASHA post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Urban ASHA post is passing the High School examination. Candidates must have completed at least High School to be considered eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Urban ASHA post?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to the Urban ASHA post is between 20 years and 45 years. Candidates must fall within this age bracket to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Recruitment 2026. Both General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates are exempt from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the CMO Ghazipur Urban ASHA Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Interested candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Urban ASHA post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Urban ASHA post will involve shortlisting of applications followed by a walk-in interview. Candidates will be evaluated based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: The Urban ASHA posts are contractual in nature. This means the employment will be on a contract basis, and not a permanent government position.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Chief Medical Office Ghazipur. Please refer to the "Important Links" section for the official website link.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with the application form. Specific details will be available in the official notification.
